column1: Lyophilized LNP, MNP, HNP coded nanoparticle formulations can be
redispersible in both water and PBS easily even after 6 months for

both 5
and 25(cid:1)C. To further confirm oxaceprol content under differ-
ent storage conditions, drug-loading percentages were assessed over

6 months using HPLC. OXC amount was >95% for all
formulations

compared to initial OXC amount
(p > .05). Based on these findings,
these nanoparticle formulations were resuspendable with a suitable

particle size and drug content
for
IA injection in the OA treatment
